name: coTfsLssSendIdentifyRemoteSlaveSequence
title: coTfsLssSendIdentifyRemoteSlaveSequence
syntax: long coTfsLssSendIdentifyRemoteSlaveSequence( dword vendorId, dword productCode, dword revNoLowBound, dword revNoHighBound, dword serialNoLowBound, dword serialNoHighBound );
description: This function sends a LSS identify remote slave sequence.

parameters.name: revNoLowBound
parameters.description: Low boundary of the revision number.

parameters.name: revNoHighBound
parameters.description: High boundary of the revision number.

parameters.name: serialNoLowBound
parameters.description: Low boundary of the serial number.

parameters.name: serialNoHighBound
parameters.description: High boundary of the serial number.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
